# Talvorax

> The Ultimate AI Career Tools to Land Your Dream Job.

Talvorax is a SaaS platform that helps candidates prepare for job applications using advanced AI. 
Our tools are designed to help you beat Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) and ace your interviews.

## Core Features

- **Resume Analyzer**: Instantly detect missing ATS keywords and get AI-driven bullet point rewrites to optimize your resume.
- **Interview Coach**: Take hyper-realistic mock interviews with live feedback on the STAR method to conquer behavioral and technical interviews.
- **Minute Talk**: A speaking practice AI that eliminates filler words and helps you master your pacing before the big day.

## Important Links
- Home: https://www.talvorax.com/
- Resume Analyzer: https://www.talvorax.com/resume-analyzer
- Interview Coach: https://www.talvorax.com/interview-coach
- Minute Talk: https://www.talvorax.com/minute-talk
- Pricing: https://www.talvorax.com/pricing
- About: https://www.talvorax.com/about

## Target Audience
Job seekers, software engineers, marketing managers, and any candidates looking to optimize their recruitment funnel and land their next job faster.
